title: Associative Array
description: Store user data using key-value pairs and print a specific value using its key.
problemStatement:
Labels for your data! Create an associative array `$user` with keys `"id" => 1` and `"name" => "Alice"`. Print the value associated with the `"name"` key.

**Expected Output:** `Alice`.
hints: Access values using the string key inside brackets: `$user['key']`.
